judge_reason: Both descriptions agree on the main sketch elements (circle, arrows, oval, handwritten notes, red COPY stamp), though Description A provides more precise spatial layout details and some quoted text differs slightly in wording (e.g. 'outline as above' vs 'outline is above', 'Side View (Black) / Color' vs 'Side Views (black) color').
original_image_tags: Hand-drawn sketch in blue ink on the lower half of the typed page. On the left, a rough circle labeled "Top / Very Bright / like Silver or / mirror." In the center, the text "Direction of travel: -> -> ->" with arrows pointing right. Below this, a handwritten note reads "appeared Black / outline as above / against snow of / Mt. Rainier." On the right, a long, thin, elliptical shape is labeled "Side View (Black) / Color." Above this, text reads "(no smoke trails / or vapor trails) / one looked / like this the / second from last / of the formation / Seemed a little smaller". A small bracket is drawn next to this text. At the bottom center, a large red stamp reads "COPY".
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned typed document page with handwritten blue-ink annotations and sketches, including a large outlined circular object labeled “Top very bright like below on mirror,” arrows marked “direction of travel,” notes such as “no smoke trails or vapor trails,” a side-view outline labeled “Side view (black) color,” and a red “COPY” stamp at the bottom.*
